title: hopea bracteata var. perakensis
intro: Hopea bracteata var. perakensis, also known as Perak Hopea or Hopea Perakensis, is a plant species belonging to the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to help alleviate fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste for internal and external use, although its efficacy and safety need further scientific validation.
